nodes.text: Page: Tenant Delivery Hub

nodes.body: Text: Welcome to your Delivery Hub | Manage all your package deliveries, schedule drop-offs, and coordinate with building management for seamless delivery service.
nodes.text: UI: Text: Welcome to your Delivery Hub | Manage all your package deliveries, schedule drop-offs, and coordinate with building management for seamless delivery service.
System Update: Update: User | {last_login} = Current Date/Time
UI: Tabs: Delivery Management
UI: Incoming Deliveries Tab:

Q: Select your preferred delivery window
